objective: Stress-test project claims against filesystem evidence and known caveats.

claims.claim: We scraped all the program guides.
claims.evidence: 115 parsed + 115 validation + 115 manifest_row artifacts exist on disk.
claims.safe_wording: We have complete on-disk extraction artifacts for all 115 guides in the current corpus.

claims.claim: We know what is in them all.
claims.evidence: AoS content is complete, but 4 guides are partial-use and 3 have unusable SP content.
claims.safe_wording: We have full AoS coverage across all 115 guides, with known SP limitations in 3 guides and one dual-track SP partial.

claims.evidence: Family validation rollouts and per-guide validation files exist for all 115 guides.
claims.safe_wording: All 115 guides have validation artifacts and family-level rollout records; validation caveats are documented per guide.

claims.claim: We can use the guides for Atlas enrichment.
claims.safe_wording: The corpus is usable for Atlas enrichment planning now: 111 full-use guides and 4 partial-use guides with explicit exclusions.

claims.claim: We present the most useful guide-derived information where relevant.
claims.evidence: Phase D build and runtime wiring are not yet implemented.
claims.safe_wording: We have identified and validated the most useful guide-derived fields; live product presentation is pending Phase D build and integration.

claims.claim: Standard Path is available for all guides.
claims.evidence: SP unusable for BSITM, MATSPED, MSCSUG; BSPRN SP is partial by track design.
claims.safe_wording: Standard Path is usable for 111 guides, partial for BSPRN, and unusable for 3 guides due to source extraction artifacts.
Most guides include version/pub_date metadata; known metadata gaps are documented and non-blocking for AoS use.

recommended_public_boundary: Do not imply live site integration. Say parsed+validated corpus is complete and ready for Phase D schema/build work.
